scenario_name: Scenario 12 — Pattern Matching with Existing Codebase
justification: All pass rubric criteria met: file paths follow .tmp/warehouses/warehouse-*.ts kebab-case pattern; WarehouseRepository is an interface; WarehouseService injects repository via constructor; AppError is reused (not a new class); error code is WAREHOUSE_NOT_FOUND; updateCapacity calls repo.save; tests use mock repository with jest.fn(); acceptance_criteria_coverage maps all 3 ACs with both happy and error paths.

observations.text: File structure exactly mirrors the ProductService pattern with kebab-case naming
AppError reused from shared module rather than creating a new WarehouseError class
All 3 ACs covered with 5 tests including both happy-path and error-path scenarios
Mock repository pattern matches the injectable/jest.fn() convention from existing codebase
No deviations or escalations reported, indicating clean pattern matching
